title: The Alliance Faces Kaido’s Cruel Momentum
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Momonosuke, Unknown person #9, Luffy, Kaido as The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.
scene: The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So some still won't let their spirits break...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Liar!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I don't believe you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Get down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't give up!! Not until it's all over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Onigashima will now land on the flower capital, without delay!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll find I won't be as soft as Orochi was!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This country is just a giant weapons factory to me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care if they're women or children!! Everyone here is my slave!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll be free to drop dead after your bodies can't take any more work!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's how you'll live the rest of your miserable lives!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, I can always replace you when you're gone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You chose to oppose me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Facing my wrath now should come as no surprise!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what it means to lose in war!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please NO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You gambled with your rights and dreams!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Spare my wife and child!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Bring me momonsuke!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This doesn't end until then!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hehehe!! Now's our change!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Get Kid and Law!! Take their heads!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They're at the end of their rope!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You may have beaten big mom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But Kaido-San is tougher than a fortress!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You never had a chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Protect the Captains!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
